meta.title: Customer Service Mini Assessment
meta.subtitle: Short evaluation focused on communication, problem-solving, professionalism, and customer interaction

sections.title: Communication
sections.description: Clarity, listening skills, and customer interaction

questions.label: Q1 - Active Listening
questions.text: Why is active listening important when speaking with a customer?

questions.label: Q2 - Clear Communication
questions.text: How would you explain a problem to a customer in a simple and professional way?

questions.label: Q3 - Handling Complaints
questions.text: What should you do first when a customer is unhappy or complaining?

questions.label: Q4 - Finding a Solution
questions.text: What makes a good solution to a customer problem?
expectedAnswer: It is delivered in a timely way

questions.label: Q5 - Professional Attitude
questions.text: What does professionalism mean in a customer-facing role?

questions.label: Q6 - Managing Pressure
questions.text: How would you stay professional during a stressful situation at work?
